tracks.title: Take You There
tracks.lyrics:
[Chorus]
I've been through some things and I can take you to a place
Where those angels on your shoulder dance with devil everyday
I know you don't know me, maybe you've been through it, too
All of my brothers and my sisters, take a walk inside my shoes
And I can take you there
Take you there
Take you there
All of my brothers and my sisters, take a walk inside my shoes
And I can take you there

[Verse 1]
I done had a hard time channeling my life like whoa poor me
If I never roll so deep, would I behave, would I breathe easy
No, no, please
All I really know is that I was lonely
No sleep, no cheese; it was killing slowly
Now I got it locked
Won't leave 'til I get what I deserve
And it's what I owe me
Don't get it twisted, I know that I'm here all because of my fans
I ain't a regular man
I may need you to get outta my face if you don't understand

[Pre-Chorus]
'Cause I been through too much and I don't need another fight
I've been doing this all of my life, my life

[Chorus]

[Verse 2]
Take you to when I was 7 and meeting my dad
Backtrack to the bad days, to that phase
And sad ways, way before facts and rap paid
Backstabs in fact made me lash back
Lay 'em off flat, I'm past raging
You gon' have to go a little bit harder
Than you been goin' if you wanna keep me down
I ain't gonna frown, leave me in the water when I drown
If you fishy, I don't wanna be around

[Pre-Chorus]

[Chorus]

tracks.title: I Ain't A Saint
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I got a lot on my mind, let me say it with the chest
Give it a rest, put all the rumors to bed, lately I ain't been impressed
What you been thinking?
What you been drinking?
All of that lean got you feeling pressed
Yes, I know I've got issues and some might offend you, who would've guessed

I ain't a regular guy, don't look at me like it when I arrive
I've been ahead of my time, I'm young in the face and dead in the eyes
Give me your focus and give me your soul, I've given you mine
Now come a bit closer, I feel the emotion, feel every vibe
And I wanna feed, everybody's gotta bleed, now it's either you or me
I ain't gonna let 'em breathe, nobody safe, nobody free
You wouldn't believe, what I've done when I speed
G in me got me looking like I need to know peace
I need release, give me a reason, give me a lease
On this life, what it means, some of it has been a dream
Some of it has been a nightmare and I feel it more when I sleep
Don't wake me please, I wanna hurt, I wanna seethe

[Chorus]
Yeah, I ain't a saint
Look at me, look what I've done

[Verse 2]
Yeah, I went on tour, thought it'd open up a door
Did it again, did it again and again, even if I can't afford
What it would do to me when I would come home, energy in me will run low
Looking for a little dopamine, a little serotonin, no luck though
I've been through it and I still go through it when I'm feeling real low
Getting money but I feel broke, put it into what I built slow
If I didn't, I would blow it all, bring in what you'd probably kill for
Doing everything I need to, just so maybe I could feel hope

I don't know how to communicate, there's a lot for you to learn when I write
Every time I go and turn to the mic, I ain't got a single worry in sight
These days, I ain't doing much and I feel bad so I work in the night
I just really wanna sleep in, every minute like a weekend
Maybe I don't wanna be here, maybe I don't wanna pretend
Maybe I just need change, maybe I just need to breathe in
Maybe I just need to reset, need therapy or need Jesus

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Save My Soul
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I was so depressed, I was such a mess, ain't nobody clean up like me
I was in the feels, but I stayed real, now they wanna be just like me
Every day living like I start at the beginning again and again, beginning to get at my psyche
There was no like no way out for me, you see, I'd bleed me out
Let my feet fall flat - humble, don't wanna be all that
But I speak a different colorful language all day, don't play with the neon raps

[Pre-Chorus]
I was at the bottom, now I'm here
Defeated every one of all my fears
And every single day, I would try to pray
I don't know to who but maybe they'd take it all away

[Chorus]
And save my soul
My soul (yeah)
Save my soul
My soul

[Verse 2]
You might know about me, but you'll never see
Who I tend to be, when I stray, clearly
I needed help, I am my own breathing hell
And it's like I need to fail, feed the shell, that's alright with me
Cause now, every time I get down, when I cannot be found
I let it all go and feel it 'til it puts me on the ground

[Verse 3]
Every day I'm trying to be the best, take for granted not a single breath
I don't wanna be the one that's left, juggling the pain and this regret
Knowing I'ma fade away in death, so I'm engineering every step
Maybe I was selling my soul, I wanted to fall and vomit up a couple new songs
Sick in the stomach, the hunger of an underdog
Lit up a tunnel but it illuminated fog, got to envision it when you kill it in the dark

[Pre-Chorus]
[Chorus]

tracks.title: Liar (Stripped)
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
There's a war inside of me that runs so deep (yeah)
And I don't know which side that I'm gonna feed (oh, no)
I tried to be somebody good for you
For me, for them, it's true
But I get so misunderstood
I lose my cool, when I get blue

[Hook]
I start to bargain with angels
Devil won't leave me alone
I noticed that you were stable
He says to me as I go
And I'm back right where I started from again
It's the way I cope with pain and find my head
I'm a liar and I'm angry, I'm so mad
I'm a liar, I'm a liar

[Verse 2]
Locked up in the room, energy feels like a tomb
There's a knock at the door and I just can't answer
I'm lit and I don't wanna move
How much did I just consume
Cause I can't breathe and I can't see truth
Am I gonna die? Am I gonna lose my mind?
If I keep this up I'm through
Is it your fault? Is it my fault?
Who do I blame when I can't think right?
Is it cause I can't find love, that I'm too damn selfish
And anyone close I fight?
All I really know right now is that I can't find light
And it winds up giving me a fright

[Hook]

[Bridge]
I tried to be somebody good for you
For me, for them, it's true
But I guess it's all misunderstood
I lose my cool, when I get blue

[Hook]

tracks.title: Last Stand
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
They say, never ever gonna mount to anything in this life
But I've got some pride I'm not swallowing, call on it tonight
And they may be right, dropped right outta my high school
Got a gun to my head every night, real talk, with a trigger that I might pull
Nobody knows it, it's over for me, I'm over the edge
And I'm blowing up inside cause I'm not who I'm supposed to be
Nobody's chosen me, too sick for the heavens and yet
I've neglected the demons in my head

Never gonna get another chance at joy with somebody else
Cause I'm too vindictive, addicted to pain
Gotta get my fam outta debt, get my hands on a cheque with a mic
I just don't trust anyone anymore, you're an enemy

[Hook]
This is my last stand, tell me what you really mean
Cause after this record I'm headed for the guillotine
I can't take it, I've made myself to be someone that I'm not and it's crazy
So save all your goodbyes, I'm gonna give it to you one last time
So if you hear me, just throw your fists up
You're gonna miss me when I'm gone and I give up

[Verse 2]
Day one I'mma take it slow, happiness - I can't make it show
Cause I've been forgotten, there's no fixing a forsaken home
This may be the last album if you don't stop sleeping and playing me
Cause you are never gonna hear another motherfucker drop this shit like David G

[Hook]

[Bridge]
You're gonna miss me
You're gonna miss me when I'm gone

[Hook]

tracks.title: Lately
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
You knew you were playin' with fire
Told you I'd break your heart, I'm no liar
I've never been the type to settle down
Must get that from my dad, I get around
Lately everyone thinks they know me
That's probably why I've been so lonely
Just broke up with my girl, been holed up from the world

[Bridge]
It's hard to be the man everyone expects me to be when I'm hurt
You don't wanna know what I do when I'm alone
Lately all I ever really wanna do is work
Living with a gift and a curse

[Hook]
Lately, I've been in a little bit of pain, need
Somebody to maybe come and save me
It's probably what you thinkin' 'bout me
Oh no, no, no, I'm good, you know I'm good

[Verse 2]
We knew I'd end up the way I am
Never really been that good of a man
I'm manic and it's hard to settle down
Must get that from my mama when I'm down
Lately I think my brain's on empty
I struggle every day, my demons wanna play

[Verse 3]
I been in the game, wearin' everybody's energy
The weight of it killin' me and I think I'm 'bout to break
People have been tellin' me I'm brave
For the way that I let him in and say

[Hook]

tracks.title: Going Through It
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse]
Somebody better come get me, cause I ain't got a lot to lose
What I've been through, sort of distorted my views
Ain't got a fam, ain't got a home, ain't got a plan
Ain't got a single thing that I've been doing right
But I don't really think you'd understand
Cause on the surface, everything's perfect
Yeah, I've been making money, rubber bands
But I've been trying to be somebody other than me
And I don't remember who I am

I found out my ex was having a baby, crazy
That one left me kinda bummed
Should've been mine, it should've been mine

[Hook]
I know that everything I'm going through has got a reason
When you're going through it that's all that you can believe in
You may not deserve it, no, but maybe it was needed
Gotta keep your head up if you really wanna beat it

[Verse 2]
I been living a lie, but bringing it by though
And I'm willing to die, for the rhythm that I know
Cause I don't like change, and I won't behave
I got nothing but destruction on my brain
I'm lonely, and I don't know how to be a different man

I feel for the kids the most
Cause they don't really get to know
What's going on between us both
All they see is we ain't close

[Outro]
I've been feeling all good
Been feeling all right
I'm feeling all good until I'm not alright
Then it gets bad for me
Bad for me (for me)

tracks.title: Hate Being Alone
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I really wish that I could be there to tell you that I'm sorry
And hug your head into my chest so you can feel my heartbeat
But then again I know that I'm alone and there's a reason
But the silence is the hardest part of it I've had to breathe in
I stopped hangin' with my friends soon as I got with you
And now it's sort of bittersweet that all I've really got is you

[Hook]
You don't love me
You just hate being alone
You just hate being alone
You'd rather be unhappy
I don't love you
I just hate being alone
I just hate being alone
I'd rather be unhappy

[Verse 2]
I was imperfection at its greatest, but it didn't matter to you
I was there and you would take it
But it was good for me cause you were my disabler
But soon as tables got to turnin' you were my enabler
The only conversation that we had is when we'd shout a bit

[Verse 3]
I hate it when you're there, I hate it when you're gone
I hate it that I had to turn this shit into a song
I never want to be with you again
Psyche, I'm only jokin' baby, you know that I love you to no end
Maybe we can find some common ground and work it out
On second thought, you need to get the fuck out of my house
So I can call you five minutes later, bring you back
You can kiss me and then flip your shit and then we can relax

[Hook]

tracks.title: Waist Deep
tracks.lyrics:
[Hook]
I start to feel like I'm waist deep
In this crazy life I live
I get so mad, wish I could go back
To a simpler time than this

[Verse 1]
Life has gotta be a comedy skit
I'm trying to laugh at it, but must admit it got me a bit
Went from living with a beautiful woman that used to ride for me
To riding by myself in this cold unbearable odyssey
Now I'm potentially facing the penitentiary
And all I do is stress
And it triggers the methamphetamine addiction
I swear to God if it wasn't for fucking rapping
And the music I would probably use til I hit the casket

[Verse 2]
I'm getting older, and I really start to notice it
I'm still living at home and supposed to be grown or owning shit
I'm living as if every single day is like a final shot
Presently aware of every moment to defy the clock
And high or not, I'm still expressing gratitude

[Outro]
Maybe one day
Maybe one day

tracks.title: Soul Search
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I've grown up a lot and I'm tryna be different, I hope that you noticed it too
I'm not as angry as I used to be when I started to rap and was broken in two
Nothing was sweeter to me than ideas of bein' more than someone nobody knew
If you knew what I was thinkin' about, it was harder to suppress all the anger
Yellin' at the microphone was the only way I was able to cope with these changes

But when I was down in the gutter knew everybody that had ever come around me had it like that
Time passed by and I finally got the mind back
All I know is I ain't done with the flow any moment I'm goin' to show you what I know

And some of you really believe that an artist just isn't entitled to change
I think it's just a deflection of your own rejection of copin' with life in these ways

[Bridge]
You will now know that if I'm goin' down then it's down with a fight
I'm tired of hidin' the way that I feel to make somebody feel as if they wanna like me
I ain't about that life!
It is therapeutic listening
I ain't listening to anybody but me, when I write I'm gonna write my history

[Outro]
I'm on a mission to soul search
I am aware that the globe hurts
I don't know where I'ma find me, but when I do I'ma prob'ly have no words

tracks.title: Fake It
tracks.lyrics:
[Hook]
I think there's something wrong with me, I feel crazy
And I don't seem to get along with people these days
See it started as a problem for me, now I embrace it
If I ain't in the mood dude, I ain't gonna fake it
Life is only everything you make it
If I ain't in the mood dude, I ain't gonna fake it

[Verse 1]
I've just gotta know, what is it you want from me
It's a slippery slope, tryna bleed you and it's haunting me
Every night I sleep, praying that I wake
To be the man I want to be and rap another day
I won't ever give up, I pray I don't give in
To what I contemplate when I'm debating all my sins

I'm so trapped in my own madness

[Verse 2]
People tell me every day that I should write more happy raps
I'm not about to back flip, don't treat me like an acrobat
Walking on a tight rope, but these days I ain't half as mad
I don't work a 9 to 5, I ain't got a boss to please
It's more than rap to me, this is my whole life
I only do this for freedom, not your cosign
The darkest corners I live in will be so bright

[Hook]

tracks.title: Bottled Up
tracks.lyrics:
Usually I turn a cheek
Usually I let it go
But I feel this burning deep
And I fear I'm set to blow
So to hell with the courtesy
Never felt it affect me so
Been about ten years, had a good run
But I'm finna have an episode

Got too much going on
Like, court dates in a week, I'm stressed
Prosecutors wanna see me rest
In a cell, oh well, and I'm eating less
On top of it all, lost my friend
And the woman that I love is leaving next

[Hook]
There's not enough time in the day
To beat around the bush
Just say what you wanna say
Cause all I do is pray
Somebody's gonna fuck with me today
I've been bottling this up
And I think I'm about to break

I'm way too young to be jaded
On the outside, I could be a lamb
But I've got the potential to be a bear, I know
I'm a nice guy with a limit, better watch your mouth

When I was a boy, I was mad
I don't wanna go back
Now I'm like, one more problem away from erupting
And fuck it, we don't want that
That'll put me in jail again

[Hook]

tracks.title: Let Me Know
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
These days I don't smoke much
You see I got a little caught up in the nose stuff
But I don't do that anymore either
But I ain't judging your choices
Who am I to voice if I ain't picking your poison
I get it, you've gotta quiet the voices
Please believe me, I have been afraid
And it's never easy, if your heart's not brave

[Pre-Hook]
But you're in good company now
Just let me know when you need out
Put your faith into me
I'll take you away

[Hook]
I ain't got a quarrel in the world
And I'm all good, how 'bout you?
We just want to have a good time
Let me know though, how 'bout you?
Some of us smoke, some don't
Some of us will, some won't
We just want to let it all go

[Verse 2]
If you feel like an outcast
If you feel like your time has about passed
Then maybe you were just like me
Never knew you'd have it so rough like me, yeah
Now follow me or follow to your grave
Wallowing will make you hollow, I just bottle it and pray

[Bridge]
I don't wanna fuss or fight
I don't wanna lose my light
I just wanna be alright
I just wanna sleep at night

[Pre-Hook]
[Hook]

tracks.title: Human
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Each and every single one of us has made a mistake
Yeah, we make another, feel us if they're shamed and afraid
God, I'm walking on these egg shells and saving the face
Scared to death of happiness, as if we'll take it away
You can say that I've been part of it, I'm guilty of that

But the silver lining that we find in horrible plight
Is that we learn a little more about the war that we fight
We still need help to rebuild within society
We see another struggle and think, "it doesn't apply to me"
That's where you're wrong, together we are strong

[Chorus]
I'm human, and I do fall down
But it's the way I react that defines me now
I know that if I trust my heart
That it'll lead me to a better life and out of the dark

[Verse 2]
I used to laugh a lot, I used to love my life
I used to rip it on the mic and I was nothing nice
But as the years went by, I felt the pressure of stardom
And started following fads, and it made me lesser
The fans noticed it, alienated them
And I blamed it on 'em when it didn't work, and I hated them
But what I've learned is, that it's my own fault
For ever doubting myself and letting the flows fall

[Chorus]

[Outro]
The way to make it go away
Is all in how you react

tracks.title: Let It Go
tracks.lyrics:
[Hook]
Let it go
It's like starting over
Get rid of that weight on your shoulders
And just let it go
What does it matter to you anyway
Just let it go

[Verse 1]
Why you holdin' on so tight
Why can't you just let it go
What's goin' on in your life
Everything could be so nice
Why you always so mad
Why you always so bitter

[Pre-Hook]
I can't afford to hold on
Ain't good for me no more
Just do you and I'll do me
Cause it's me I gotta support
You bottle up and I used to
But I let it out and record

[Hook]

[Verse 2]
Why you holdin' on to a grudge
Can't you see it's your energy
That you abuse and you use it up
Life is way more cool to live
When you ditch the hate for something you could love
You're a time bomb tick tick
You wouldn't wanna be around for the boom
Defuse cause

[Pre-Hook]
[Hook]

[Bridge]
Now tell me it don't
Feel better when you let it go
When you let it go
Something happens inside you
Something changes inside you

[Hook]

tracks.title: Last Forever
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
It felt like my life was on the wrong track
I'd have done whatever just to bounce back
Company that I kept, nights I ain't slept
Part of me knew I was all about that
Now I've got life on my mind (Mhm)
I was so stressed all the time (Mhm)
Loved ones, I'd snap back and fight them (Mhm)
Fake friends I tend to invite them (Mhm)

It's kinda funny how I keep enemies close
And I push away the ones I love the most
It's kinda funny how you don't know what you got
Until it's gone and you look like you saw a ghost

[Pre-Hook]
I knew I had to make some changes, some major changes
Out of fingers to point the blame with
All me, hang ten, so dangerous

[Hook]
Hang in there, hang in there
It's what they say to me
I do anything I've gotta do, got a family
And it's looking up for me, looking up for me
I want this to last forever, forever

[Verse 2]
Now I've got life on my mind (Mhm)
Lord knows that I've done my grime (Mhm)
I can't come off like I'm righteous (Mhm)
Truth is I was not the nicest (Mhm)
It's kinda funny even if you beat the fire
You still gotta find a way to breathe the smoke

[Pre-Hook]
[Hook]

tracks.title: Love Is A Drug
tracks.lyrics:
[Chorus]
Just give me one hit, one dose
Baby, if I take too much I'm done for
Because your love is a drug, and it can be fatal

[Verse 1]
You and me together, we go way back
My forbidden food, I knew what it'd do when I ate that
Bitter sweet, I hate that
Won't front, it don't taste bad
Knowing that it's no good for me though will make me crave that
I can't get enough, be my fire, let that flame lick
I think this is dangerous
Sitting somewhere in the middle between love and hatred

[Pre-Chorus]
Cause you, you, you
Made me forget it all and cause it
Oh you, you, you
Will be the death of me, I'm falling
For you, you, you
I know that I will never be enough

[Chorus]

[Verse 2]
I remember when I got my first taste
You were like the best I ever had, but in the worst way
Addicted to the cake, and everyday was like my birthday
Then you blew my candles out
Don't believe in wishes now
You're allergic to my happiness, I watch you pick it out

[Bridge]
Cause I have been itching, shaking, waiting for you patiently
To give me a reason to believe there's no recovery

[Chorus]

tracks.title: That Oughta Do
tracks.lyrics:
[Chorus]
I ain't got a whole lot but it oughta do, yeah
I want that top ten spot and that oughta do, yeah
Music is all that I've got but that oughta do, yeah
Lemme get just one more shot and that oughta do, yeah

[Verse 1]
I know just what my plan is, I get by and I manage
Every time I did damage taught me something and that is
What's acquired can expire, just be grateful you have it
I been all around the world, I swear my brain is an atlas
I was sleeping on sofas in my studio to be able
To do this, had no label backing me, this ain't no fable
I'm a workhorse in my stable, you baby it from your cradle

[Bridge]
I'm grateful for my life and I paid the price, I'm free
I'm just keeping my head down, bout to tour again and head out
Always told that I'll be nothing, I'm so sorry to be a let down

[Verse 2]
This is me, ain't much to it, what you see is what you get
Used to be strung out and stressed
Never knew who I'd be next, now I'm blessed
Do right for what I've got left and get this treasure off my chest

[Chorus]

[Outro]
I make do, I make do with all that I have
The less that I need more the more that I bag
But one day, oh one day, on everything I know
That I'll have the whole world and I'm not letting go

tracks.title: Live That Life
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Lately everyone knows everyone but them
Lately everyone is following a trend
Lately everyone's caught up on who they could be
Lately no one's standing out, they wanna blend
Fall back, I am not your comrade beyond rap
Don't read me - reformat
Switch gears - install that
Y'all are stuck in middle school, let me see your hall pass

[Bridge]
You do not know me
Just what I let you see
We've all got lots of friends but use that word loosely
I do not need your acceptance to soothe me
My soul is so whole I bring everything to me

[Chorus]
It seems every, everybody's perfect
Thinking that they know someone by what's on the surface
That sound like a problem, you need to let it go
Cause everybody's talking but they don't really know
Tell me if you live that life
Cause I don't think you live that life

[Verse 2]
Lately everybody's focused on the wrong thing
Lately nobody is tryna find their calling
Lately nobody is tryna do their own thing
Lately individuality is falling

[Chorus]

tracks.title: I Know
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
They telling me they wanna get to business
But I'm about the money, got a woman that I'm missing
And even if I didn't, it isn't me that you're loving
It's everything you think that I can offer, but you're bugging

[Bridge]
And all I wanna say, is if you wanna stay
You better quit playing with me, I'm not into your games
I've got a good thing, you ain't gonna mess it

[Pre-Chorus]
And I ain't gonna break her, break her heart
I ain't gonna break her, break her heart

[Chorus]
Because I'm seeing through, I'm seeing through your plan
Even when you're telling me that you ain't got a man
Yes, I know, I know
But I don't really think you understand
And even when you're telling me that you just wanna dance
Yes, I know, I know

[Verse 2]
You're telling me you love me for myself
But, fact of the matter is that you love me for my wealth

[Bridge]
[Pre-Chorus]
[Chorus]

tracks.title: 7 Years
tracks.lyrics:
[Hook]
Once I was seven years old
My father told me, I'll never leave again
You won't be lonely
Once I was seven years old

[Verse 1]
I was a kid, I was seven
Never knew you or knew where you would be
I was like damn, who is this man?
Standing before me saying take a chance
Suddenly everything I thought I knew about the world
Was taken when I shook his hand
I was so mad, didn't know why
Why was my name all tatted on your side?

[Hook]
Once I was eleven years old
My momma told me, I won't do this again
Need you to go please
Once I was eleven years old

[Verse 2]
I wasn't there, I didn't care
Moving around a lot and couldn't bare
Breaking the law, getting expelled
Didn't believe in nothing, you could tell
Wanted to fail, gunnin' for jail
Wanted to kill my father in a cell
Too young to bottle this up in my chest
Got into blow, got into dope
Made an investment with nothing to show

[Hook]
Once I was twenty years old
My father wrote me
Son, I'm sorry that you never got to know me
Once I was twenty years old

[Verse 3]
I didn't know then, and I don't know now
Why it was hard for me to write it down
I was right in the middle of using, abusing and losing myself
I knew not of sobriety
I didn't feel like I could be a role model entirely
I couldn't be somebody's light if I don't love myself

[Hook]
But soon I'll be sixty years old
And will I still hold on
To everything that happened and be so cold?
Soon I'll be sixty years old
